description: Stable extension points. New capabilities should plug into these interfaces instead of changing the core pipeline.
core_rule: Core business tables and pipeline stages stay stable. New source types, enrichers, scorers, auth providers, exporters, and report generators are added by registration.

source_adapter.purpose: Fetch or receive data from one source type and persist canonical raw_items.

content_extractor.purpose: Optionally enrich raw_items with extracted article body, language, images, author, and metadata.
content_extractor.rule: Extraction enriches raw_items but must keep raw_payload_json unchanged.

normalizer.registry_key: source_type optional hook, otherwise default normalizer
normalizer.required_output: news_items with source_url or source_title plus created_at for dedupe eligibility
normalizer.rule: Normalizer can derive canonical_url, content, created_at, focus_id, and dedupe_key. It must keep raw_item_id.

dedupe_strategy.purpose: Group duplicate news_items and select representative winner.
dedupe_strategy.rule: Hard dedupe only removes duplicates from active recommendation flow; it never deletes raw_items.

generator_provider.purpose: Generate structured Chinese news copy from recommended news items.
generator_provider.rule: Generated sourceUrl and created_at are not trusted; final values are forced from news_items/raw_items.

report_builder.purpose: Build daily reports, weekly reports, and topic reports from recommendation or editor-selected items.
report_builder.rule: Report-level edits are stored as editor overrides, not by mutating raw_items or generated_news.

exporter.purpose: Export adopted report items to external formats.
exporter.input: published report items joined to generated_news, news_items, raw_items
exporter.rule: Company SQL exporter must follow config/contracts/news_sql_mapping.json exactly.

auth_adapter.purpose: Resolve an external identity from public login, OIDC, SAML, or trusted intranet headers.
auth_adapter.rule: Auth adapter only proves identity. Local RBAC decides permissions.

workspace_module.purpose: Add a new work scope or optional additive module such as AI tools without forking the app.
workspace_module.rule: Every workspace keeps core intelligence modules. Optional modules are additive; shared sources are enabled through workspace_source_links.

label_set.purpose: Add configurable first-level and second-level labels for source configuration, candidate pool review, reports and future domains.
label_set.rule: Labels attach through content_labels. Do not add custom per-workspace label columns.

domain_pack.purpose: Add a new strategic intelligence board such as hardware, semiconductor, robotics, policy, market, or competitor without changing the core pipeline.
domain_pack.rule: Domain packs configure sources, labels, scoring weights, reports and exports. They must not fork the backend or frontend codebase.

sync_adapter.purpose: Move selected objects between public, intranet and local deployments.
sync_adapter.rule: Public-to-intranet sync can move public signals and recommendations. Intranet users, feedback, requirements and tasks stay intranet-only by default.
